case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS GOLNAZAR MITRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,020.90 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLNAZAR MITRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLNAZAR MITRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLNAZAR MITRA $1,020.90 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,066.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLNAZAR MITRA
